thag6.2:1.2:
The rice:
gone to be threshed.
thag6.2:1.3: But I don’t get any alms.
thag6.2:2.2: Your body pervaded with rapture, you’ll be at the height of continual joy.
thag6.2:3.2: Your body pervaded with rapture, you’ll be at the height of continual joy.
thag6.2:4.2: Your body pervaded with rapture, you’ll be at the height of continual joy.
thag6.2:5.1: You live in the open air.
thag6.2:5.3: Don’t suffer, overcome with the cold.
thag6.2:5.4: Go into your hut, with its fastened bolt.
thag6.2:6.2: With them, I’ll dwell in comfort.
thag6.2:6.3: I won’t suffer from the cold,
